item.title: The defeat of fascism
item.description: In Finland: the racist far-right party Perussuomalaiset lost more than half of their votes in municipal election compared with last time. They have been in government for two years. Their administration has severely reduced social security, 50k people have lost their jobs and they've even made the homelessness rate go up for the first time in 11 years. Couple of years ago they were super popular and won big in the election of the parliament, and then f*cked up (as expected). In the photo above you can see their faces as the votes have been counted and published. I think this is one of the most beautiful pictures I've seen in years.
item.dc:creator: MiffyFin

item.title: Some tips. A myriad of responses, if even one helps one person, that's enough.
item.description:
Credit to ONeRadLatina on IG
Leaving an abusive partner, family, community, state, country, is not as easy as the internet comments may make it seem. Building what we have, where we have it, begins to change the sociocultural landscape around us.
Community is important. Passions, crafts, sports, whatever community you have, dive in.
Self defense is subjective. Jiujitsu, self defense class, pepper spray, concealed carry, a charming smile and making a friend, all are ranges of feeling safe.
Spread our online footprint. Make anonymous accounts to track and post political news, and separate accounts for when we need our oxytocin.
Nothing makes them madder than enjoying yourself and minding your own business. Joy is an act of resistance.
Leaving politics on mute leaves our head in the sand, on surprise headlines blindsiding us. It's like turning the weather channel off before hurricane/fire/tornado season.
Not fun conversations, but important ones. Knowing what neighbors are safe, what options we have, prepping to be nimble and adaptive lend a sense of planning, security.
Cheers all. Find some joy. Share some joy. Thank you, appreciate you.
item.dc:creator: theSoulciologist

item.title: Remember kids, if you don't sin, Jesus died for nothing.
item.description:
cru·​ci·​fic·​tion ˌkrü-sə-ˈfik-shən 1 a: capitalized : the fairy tale that a god sent himself, to kill himself, as a sacrifice to himself, to forgive the "sins" you will do, that he created you to want to do, so he wouldn't have to send you to an eternal fiery pit, that he created to punish you for acting on the instincts he gave you, because he loves you. Instead of just forgiving the sins, without killing anyone. b : the act of making up elaborate bullshit
Weird ass cult or Trump rally? Yes.
item.dc:creator: dickblack12

item.dc:creator: Jonson71

item.title: My marriage is over...
item.description: My wife let me know yesterday she wants a divorce. That's, one of the hardest things I've had to write down. One part of me knew, we've drifted too far apart. And yet another part of things, we can make it work. Idk if it's worth it. It's just hard when my only support mechanism is a very small group of online friends who don't know what I'm going through. I'm lonely and afraid. I know at one point I'll need to speak with someone. I will. Just right now, idk. Thanks for listening...
item.dc:creator: klaceo

item.title: Scrappy do
item.dc:creator: DOcelot1

item.title: What Happened Today #79
item.description: ?️ Even with Trump not having any public events yesterday or today, the chaos kept rolling. Airstrikes, book bans, censorship, deportations, and rewired diplomacy all kept moving. This wasn’t a sleepy Saturday. It was a quiet churn of structural change while the boss stayed offstage and out of sight. Have an Easter candy, a matzoh, or whatever pleases you today, and then go reach out to your reps again. Constant pressure is the only way we get out of this. Subscribe free at https://govbrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist 1. https://go.govbrief.today/hegseth-aides 2. https://go.govbrief.today/easter-yemen 3. https://go.govbrief.today/seattle-jan6-cops 4. https://go.govbrief.today/iran-talks 5. https://go.govbrief.today/state-reorg 6. https://go.govbrief.today/scotus-appeal 7. https://go.govbrief.today/vance-vatican 8. https://go.govbrief.today/dhl-tariffs 9. https://go.govbrief.today/navy-lecture 10. https://go.govbrief.today/apr19-protests
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Stop the Steal!
item.description: To keep making comics, we were going to sell our souls to a secret society, but then we thought, „Hey, why not ask our readers instead?“ Turns out, asking nicely works better than we thought. So here we are, humbly inviting you to join our Patreon. You can get early comics, secret comics, and even love letters! Your support = more comics and us being slightly less desperate. Thanks for being our hero: https://www.patreon.com/warandpeas
item.dc:creator: Warandpeasofficial

item.title: Take On Me Inspired Body paint - MCroft07
item.description: I know everyone loves this music video and song in particular. I was playing The Last of Us 2 and the song came on and I thought it would be cool to do a paint inspired by it and try and see if I can turn myself into a sketch :) Thanks for all the nice comments, it's appreciated. Now for the big whammy faq Faq: I use body paint and do these in a mirror No, it is not AI I don’t recreate the reference photo like for like so I’ve put in a photo, but I prefer to change parts of the design to make it more “my version”. I use professional body paint covers (pasties) this means I am not wearing a top but I am also not naked. I paint myself, I make the props myself, I film myself, and I also edit. This is my full time thing now (yayy) I paint these by looking in a mirror, with brushes, and paint It takes between 6-12 hours each Body painting myself is my hobby/passion I do own clothes It doesn’t tickle “Why don’t you just wear clothes” once again, body painting myself is my hobby/passion. I am painting my skin, I am not wearing a suit - but that does not mean I am naked. I know, even I think this is a ridiculous set of questions I have to constantly answer I did not go to art school, I am self taught. Talent gets you so far, but this is a learned skill. The paint isn’t edible (gross) I've been painting myself for 16 years. The 07 does not mean I was born in 2007, UK 7 is my shoe size No, I don't need help painting my back, I don't want to paint my back, I don't need to paint my back. (also gross) No, I don't need help washing it off. (also you are gross) If you want to see more I am MCroft07 on IG, twitter, Tiktok, YouTube I paint them live on twitch I like doing the lip syncs, they're fun for me while I paint them. I couldn’t care less if you think they’re cringe. I am cringe but I am free My tattoos on my ribs are from Tomb Raider - I am a big TR fan I do not have an OF but if you want to send me money THAT badly you can just tip my twitch account. Haha. The shower afterwards takes about 15 minutes, I use a regular sponge and shower gel. The reason why it can look different at the end is because I am wearing a wig, I promise you it is not a different person because the hair changed. While on this topic, if my eyes change colour it’s because I am wearing contact lenses. (Those with an IQ above 10… I know. Even I’m shocked the wig thing is a frequent comment). I use body paint. It doesn’t tickle, I am very ticklish and this is fine. I don’t have an allergic reaction to the paint, but if you do it, you should always do a patch test first I do not know where you can buy body paint in every country. I know in the UK it is available at FacePaintingshop.com. I use a plethora of different brands, it’s best to search for them yourself online. I don’t work in Hollywood, I don’t want to. I just want to improve my body painting for myself. I am English, not American. I do not go outside like this to scare people. 1, that would be very cold. 2, in this current age, everyone would take photos without me knowing and it would likely dox me :)))))) I’m not a sweaty person, but if I was this would be a lot more difficult. Thank you to those of you who came from Imgur to my Twitch channel! “What’s the point in painting yourself when you can wear clothes?” all my clothes are in the laundry, had to resort to this, tough life It would not be quicker to jump into a pool of paint - think of the drying time?! If you're still reading this I am about to go outside and do some gardening. I don’t care that I wash it off at the end, I get to reuse this canvas, we love a reduce, reuse, recycle queen. I am not the lady who did the Maneskin video, it’s a cool video and she slayed, but it isn’t me. I can promise you there is not *a man* painting these and I am pretending to paint myself. I am genuinely painting myself. I know a lot of you don’t like reading this faq because it is horrid to see that I have to answer all of these. Unfortunately I have noticed that when I don’t put in all the icky things then I get more gross comments and I just have to spend more time blocking people so it’s better to call it out. I just copy and paste it each time anyway.
item.dc:creator: MCroft07

item.title: Its Baby Puffin Tossing Season in Iceland ...
item.description: The Pufflings leave their nests late summer, when their parents have left out at sea. It’s hunger that drives them to leave the nest. They use the moon to navigate out at sea, but they confuse the city lights with the moon and end up crashing into town where they don’t have much chance to make it to the ocean on their own. They are at risk due to car traffic, cats or even just end up starving. So that’s where the locals come to the rescue. Then they store them in a box overnight and early in the morning they head to the seaside cliffs, allow the Pufflings to get air in their wings and then throw them off so that they can safely navigate out to the ocean where they will spend the next couple of years before returning as adults to Vestmannaeyjar islands. This happens every year at the end of summer and has become an annual tradition for the locals of Vestmannaeyjar and friends and relatives. The Puffling season can last for a few weeks or as long as the adult Puffins are around. https://www.instagram.com/reel/C-77Pe4oJth/
item.dc:creator: Jbelkin

item.title: Be careful what you click on.
item.description:
Just a friendly PSA, for those who haven't already noticed. There are accounts created on imgur solely to scam you and get your information. These accounts are created on a daily basis and many don't realize they are scam bots until after the fact.
Example: https://imgur.com/user/wjuuxReactionGod - this account was created 24 hours ago and immediately posts content from reddit's trending or hot page, whatever it's called. They post something 'popular' to garner upvotes, and when they have enough to make it to imgur's Most Viral, they will edit their post and add a scam link at the bottom of their post. It may appear like a source link to whatever they're posting, but it's actually a phishing site. Note the area circled in red. https://imgur.com/gallery/livonia-protest-OGOjKi5 https://imgur.com/gallery/protests-against-trump-on-4-19-trenton-mi-eGQNGAz https://imgur.com/gallery/miles-taylor-former-cheif-of-staff-of-deparment-of-homeland-security-under-trump-im-more-republican-than-donald-trump-hes-not-conservative-putting-politics-aside-engaging-with-man-you-realize-hes-idiot-IpQlBQe These are some of their posts that were edited after getting points. It's likely they are manufacturing upvotes, comments, and views to give the illusion they are just another user with links to their source material. Please be careful when you see a new account immediately start posting viral content from reddit or other sources, with no tags, no comments. When called out, the user will block you from commenting on their post. Instead, report these accounts and hopefully the admins will be vigilant and remove these users/bots. It might be easy to spot these bots, but for those who impulsively like to click on an article link, make sure you look at the entire link and if it looks suspicious, it is.
Cat Tax. My mom's cat, Loco. Be safe out there on the internets!
item.dc:creator: AustinJolly

item.title: Let’s dance
item.dc:creator: MedicalScience
